heading: Additional criminal penalty in certain cases
label: 1957 Additional criminal penalty in certain cases
text: Whoever willfully violates, or willfully causes a violation of any regulation under this chapter, , or section 1730d of this title, where the violation is committed in furtherance of the commission of any violation of Federal law punishable by imprisonment for more than one year, shall be fined not more than $10,000 or imprisoned not more than five years, or both.section 1829b of this title1See References in Text note below.1
notes: References in Text, referred to in text, was repealed by , , .Section 1730d of this titlePub. L. 101–73, title IV, § 407103 Stat. 363Aug. 9, 1989
Amendments1992— inserted “, or willfully causes a violation of” after “Whoever willfully violates”.Pub. L. 102–550
